mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tokens (token, user_id, refresh_token, is_revoked, is_expired, expiry_date) VALUES (#{token}, #{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{isRevoked}, #{isExpired}, #{expiryDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, refresh_token, is_revoked, is_expired, device_info, expiry_date, created_date, updated_date FROM tokens WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
mapper.update: UPDATE tokens is_revoked = #{isRevoked}, is_expired = #{isExpired}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, device_info = #{deviceInfo}, updated_date = NOW() WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
